thesis_profile.market_mechanism: in the liquid perp-covered core, a four-quadrant regime classification by per-timestamp cross-sectional momentum dispersion and median momentum identifies four distinct alpha environments where leader-continuation should dominate dispersed-up regimes with minimal carry dilution, carry-dislocation should dominate dispersed-down and broad-down regimes, and a regime-adaptive leader composition shifts toward defensive low-vol grinder in broad-up while contrarian laggard tilt is strictly gated to broad-down
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank liquid perp-covered names higher by blending two adaptive sub-signals (regime-adaptive leader and carry-dislocation) plus a strictly-gated contrarian tilt where the four-quadrant weight allocation explicitly suppresses carry dilution in high-dispersion regimes to preserve leader-continuation strength in dispersed-up environments
thesis_profile.factor_formula: compute two name-level sub-scores (regime-adaptive leader smoothly blending momentum-heavy and defensive-quality forms by broad-up intensity, plus carry-dislocation) and a strictly-gated contrarian sub-score; allocate weights through a four-quadrant per-timestamp interpolation that gives leader 0.85 in dispersed-up, carry 0.75 in dispersed-down, leader-def 0.55 in broad-up, and a leader-carry-contrarian 0.20-0.40-0.40 split in broad-down
